case_title: KING, CRAIG VS HENDRICK, RONALD L. DBA DIAMOND HEIGHTS CLEANERS et al

docket_entries.description: INVALID SERVICE AS TO DEFEND, NO MAILING DONE ON SUBSERVICE.
